columns.name: AuthenticationInfoPrincipalSubject
columns.description: Subject associated with the authenticated principal in the request.

columns.description: The email address associated with the principal (e.g., user, service account) performing the action.

columns.description: The subject or identifier associated with the principal performing the action.

columns.name: AuthInfoServiceAccountDelegationInfo
columns.description: Delegation information for a service account.

columns.name: AuthorizationInfo
columns.description: Information related to the authorization of the request.

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: GCPResourceName
columns.description: The name of the resource involved in the request or logged event.

columns.name: GCPResourceType
columns.description: The type of resource involved in the request.

columns.name: InsertId
columns.description: A unique identifier for the log entry, typically used for deduplication.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: LogName
columns.description: The name of the log in which the entry resides.

columns.name: MetadataIdentityDelegationChain
columns.description: A chain of delegated identities for the request.

columns.name: MetadataMappedPrincipal
columns.description: Mapped principal in the metadata.

columns.description: The type of metadata being provided.

columns.name: MethodName
columns.description: The name of the method being invoked.

columns.name: NumResponseItems
columns.description: The number of items returned in the response.

columns.name: OperationFirst
columns.description: Boolean indicating whether this is the first operation in a sequence.

columns.description: A unique identifier for the operation.

columns.name: OperationLast
columns.description: Boolean indicating whether this is the last operation in a sequence.

columns.name: OperationProducer
columns.description: The producer (system or service) that initiated the operation.

columns.name: PayloadType
columns.description: The type of payload being processed or transmitted.

columns.name: ReceiveTimestamp
columns.description: Timestamp representing the time when the log entry was received by the system.

columns.name: RequestAccountId
columns.description: Account ID associated with the request.

columns.name: RequestFullResourceName
columns.description: Full name of the resource requested.

columns.name: RequestGrantType
columns.description: The grant type associated with the request.

columns.name: RequestIncludeInactiveApiRoles
columns.description: Boolean indicating whether inactive API roles should be included in the request.

columns.name: RequestKeyTypes
columns.description: Types of keys involved in the request.

columns.name: RequestMetadataCallerIp
columns.description: The IP address from which the request originated.

columns.name: RequestMetadataCallerSuppliedUserAgent
columns.description: The user-agent String provided by the caller during the request.

columns.name: RequestMetadataRequestAttributesTime
columns.description: Time-related attributes of the request metadata.

columns.name: RequestName
columns.description: The name of the request.

columns.name: RequestOptionsRequestedPolicyVersion
columns.description: The version of the policy requested.

columns.name: RequestPageSize
columns.description: The size of the page requested in a paginated request.

columns.name: RequestPageToken
columns.description: Token for pagination in the request.

columns.name: RequestParent
columns.description: The parent resource of the request.

columns.name: RequestPolicyAuditConfigs
columns.description: Configuration for auditing in the request policy.

columns.name: RequestPolicyBindings
columns.description: Binding configurations associated with the request policy.

columns.name: RequestPolicyEtag
columns.description: The ETag value for the request policy.

columns.name: RequestPrivateKeyType
columns.description: Type of private key being used in the request.

columns.name: RequestRemoveDeletedServiceAccounts
columns.description: Boolean indicating if deleted service accounts should be removed.

columns.name: RequestRequestedTokenType
columns.description: The type of token requested.

columns.description: Description of the role being requested.

columns.description: The unique identifier for the role.

columns.description: Permissions included in the role in the request.

columns.description: Title of the role being requested.

columns.description: Description of the service account being requested.

columns.name: RequestServiceAccountDisplayName
columns.description: Display name of the service account being requested.

columns.name: RequestShowDeleted
columns.description: Boolean indicating if deleted items should be included in the response.

columns.name: RequestSkipVisibilityCheck
columns.description: Boolean indicating whether the visibility check for the request should be skipped.

columns.description: The type of subject token being used in the request.

columns.description: The type of request being made.

columns.name: RequestUpdateMaskPaths
columns.description: The paths to be updated in the request.

columns.name: RequestView
columns.description: The view or perspective for the request.

columns.description: The topic ID associated with the resource.

columns.description: Title associated with the response.

columns.description: The severity level of the log entry or request.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: StatusCode
columns.description: The HTTP or operation status code for the response.

columns.description: The message associated with the status code.

columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.description: Timestamp representing the time at which the log entry was generated.

columns.description: The timestamp when the log entry or event occurred.
